footer.description: Immersive exhibitions | Akira & Ghost in the Shell

validation.title: Your order has been received
validation.keep_number: Keep this number for any correspondence.

authPrompt.default_message: You must be logged in to make a booking
authPrompt.desc: Sign in or create an account to continue.

akira.title: Akira
akira.content: Discover Neo-Tokyo and the physical and mental mutations of its heroes in a bright, glitchy cyberpunk world.

ghost.title: Ghost in the Shell
ghost.content: Dive into augmented consciousness and philosophical reflections on identity in the age of AI and cyber-bodies.

themes.title: Immersive themes
themes.content: Augmented bodies, AI, identity and transhumanism. Interactive installations and immersive visual projections await.

experience.title: Interactive experience
experience.content: A preview of the immersive game experience with virtual interactions and immersive soundscapes.

teaser.text: When technology surpasses humanity… dare to cross the line.

register.title: Register
register.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
register.confirmation_notice: A confirmation email will be sent after sign up.
register.password_rules: Minimum 8 characters, include 1 uppercase, 1 number and 1 special character.
register.error_message: Error during sign up. Please check the fields.

profile.title: My profile
profile.password_hint: New password (leave blank to keep current)

info.title: Practical information
info.tariff_free: Child and person with disability - Free
info.accessibility_text1: Free entry for the disabled visitor and companion upon presentation of a proof.
info.accessibility_text2: Elevator available to reach all levels.
info.accessibility_text3: Accessible toilets on the ground floor.

faq.q1: Do I need to book in advance?
faq.a1: Yes, we strongly recommend booking online to secure your preferred time slot.
faq.a2: Yes: students, jobseekers and people with disabilities are eligible for reduced rates upon presentation of proof.
faq.a3: Yes, log in to your profile to cancel your reservation.

free.title: Under 26
free.description: On presentation of a valid ID with photo and date of birth.

free.title: Disabled visitors and one companion
free.description: On presentation of a valid ID with photo and date of birth.

free.title: Teachers
free.description: On presentation of a valid Pass Éducation with photo and institution stamp. e-pass not accepted.

free.title: Museum staff
free.description: On presentation of a nominative professional badge with photo.

reduced.title: Students
reduced.description: On presentation of a student card with photo.

reduced.title: Seniors 60+
reduced.description: On presentation of a valid ID with photo and date of birth.
